description: Bill of sale for a female slave. Dating: Perhaps second half of the 11th century or beginning of the 12th century, based on the hand. This is either the final version or an additional draft of the same document as in ENA 4020.11. Seller: Ṣedaqa b. Moshe ha-Levi. Buyer: Yosef b. Shelomo. Slave: Tawfīq. Price: 25 dinars. (Information from OZ, AA, CP, ASE.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
